title: Entergy Texas declares quarterly dividend on preferred stock
text: THE WOODLANDS, Texas , Sept. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Entergy Texas, Inc. board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend payment of $0.3359375 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Utilities Stocks to Buy in September 2023
text: While utilities stocks might not be the most exciting investment category, they do offer one cynical benefit. When people flip the switch, they expect the lights to turn on.

title: Entergy: Benefiting From Strong Texas Industrial Growth
text: Entergy Corporation is well-positioned to benefit from the rapid population growth in Texas, one of the fastest-growing states in the US. The company is aggressively deploying renewable energy generation and promoting alternative fuels, despite operating in the hydrocarbon industry hub of Texas. ETR plans to invest $16 billion in expanding its infrastructure to meet the increasing demand for electricity, particularly from industrial expansion in Texas.
